subject: resnet18-imagenet-int8
notes: ImageNetV2 'matched-frequency' (10000 images, 1000 classes, class-balanced) -- NOT the original ILSVRC val set (gated behind an image-net.org account approval this pipeline can't clear non-interactively). torchvision reports 69.758% clean-val top-1 for this checkpoint; ImageNetV2 numbers run several points lower due to distribution shift (Recht et al. 2019) -- expected, not an export bug. fp32->int8 accuracy_top1 delta: -0.0025 (fp32=0.5728).
